channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: HODL and buy more BTC. — 55 replies — 220.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
HODL and buy more BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-05-21 19:02 UTC

OP

If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?

>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway. I’d rather have BTC long term than let my money rot in a savings account.

Early replies (first 3)

62245757
i get 5btc later for cheaper but thanks for the advice!

62245760
>>62245741
Too eqrly but yeah and avoid cex or at least take it out as fast as u can!

62246438
>>62245757
How much BTC are you holding right now anon?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62253489
>>62252970
Holding is good but native BTC utility is getting bigger too. Better if your BTC is being staked instead of just sitting idle the whole cycle.

62253499
>>62247434
As long as you have a plan and targets, you’re already ahead of most emotional traders.

62253652
>>62253489

This is the way. And diversify. Coins like Monero and Nerva are private like cash, and in the case of Nerva it can't even be centralized/pooled due to how it changes algorithms. TRX is another for the list because it has the highest concentration of stablecoin transactions. Don't stick to just one asset: treat them like stocks.

62254516
>>62250313
What's your basis for that?

62254625
>>62246438
This much, and heres my home address. Theres a wrench in the top drawer in the kitchen, my room is upstairs and to the left.

62256658
>>62253489
I don't think we can stake btc
>>62253652
Why people are crazy about monero?

62256668
>>62254625
You're poor and you don't have even 1 btc in your wallet.

62256679
>>62252472
You should buy btc and treat as your savings

62256924
>>62253652
Monero is fine but nerva? The nerve

62256993
>>62256658
You probably don’t know much about Babylon yet, that’s why you’re asking that.
And if they’re into Monero then yeah, privacy is obviously the priority.

62256998
>>62250366
Btc is the king!!

62257164
>>62252912
What the hell are you talking about?

62257170
>>62256993
If it's centralised services, it's a big NO

62257173
>>62247257
Add ICP and Ethereum

62257204
>>62257170
Nah. Don’t trust centralized offerings anymore.
We’ve already seen how those end up. Fully decentralized + self custody + native BTC is the way kek.

62257209
>>62252439
A lot of people will realize that too late desu.

62257223
>>62245741
fact, he's still hodling

62257253
>>62257223
Is he satoshit?

62257345
>>62257173
ICp? Lol

62257392
>>62257204
but everything in defi is hype

62257440
>>62257223

62257675
>>62245741
>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway.
BTC doesn't improve any of this. Its cheaper and easier to spend gold.

62257679
>>62246878
It was decided that BTC would never scale. Self custody is impossible on BTC. Go ahead and try it. I swear when I make it I am going to hunt small blockers with a rifle.

62257680
it's boomer coin

62258573
>>62257679
will your cut your d?

62258577
>>62257680
you have zero bitcoin

62258754
>>62257223
Where is he now

62258775
>>62257679
nonsense. It's all in your head

62258793
>>62258754

62259397
>>62245757
lets hold hands and buy in Oct

item.title: Job hunting is a literal humiliation ritual — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Job hunting is a literal humiliation ritual

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-05-21 19:08 UTC

OP

So not only do I have to go over your dogshit online questionnaire and fill it out manually even though it's just gonna be filtered by an AI that could just be fed a PDF and be done with it
I also have to tell you exactly how much I earned before, what's the lowest I can tolerate you paying me, and even explain any other benefits I may or may not have had so you know exactly how much you can rip me off?
Can't we please just burn every HR single roastie on a stake?

Early replies (first 3)

62252002
>>62251998
>he doesn't aggressively lie on job applications
ngmi

62252007
It's probably not even a real job they just want to use your data to figure out how much they are overpaying their current staff so they can do a layoff.

62252008
>>62252002
that's the entire point. why the fuck is a job interview like dating?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62252016
>>62251998
>Specify the amount and currency
Lmfao have fun competing with Indians who will take 1/10th your salary

62252023
>>62251998
Indeed — https://www.indeed.com/
LinkedIn Jobs — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs
ZipRecruiter — https://www.ziprecruiter.com/
SimplyHired — https://www.simplyhired.com/
Monster — https://www.monster.com/
Glassdoor — https://www.glassdoor.com/index.htm
FlexJobs (Remote/Flexible) — https://www.flexjobs.com/
Dynamite Jobs (Remote) — https://www.dynamitejobs.com/
Dice (Tech/IT) — https://www.dice.com/

62252027
I just lie now. I've had two interviews where I said I had two years of experience and then they claimed 3. Next time I will claim 5. Fuck you.

62252033
>>62251998
yeah its legit the most brutal shit ever. Some of these retarded job applications ask for your SSN or a 1 min selfie video recording like get real hahaha

62252034
>>62251998
lie against you, say you want minimum wage possible, they hire (you) over other candidates and then you don't show up for work, lol

62252054
>>62251998
>gonna be filtered by an AI
then use an ai to tailor to that ai

62252055
The job itself is also a humiliation ritual

62252092
>>62252033
>1 min selfie video recording like get real hahaha
i unironically sat down, recorded myself for an entire 90 seconds talking about what i like to do in christmas like a fucking imbecile, uploaded one of those dogshit videos for AI review and this is what i got

62252096
>>62251998
if you had skills in demand anon you wouldnt have to even fill these out. I worked for an underpaid company that had clients that were businesses and my performance and skills outed me. All I had to do was mention to them I was available and they didn't even interview me, just picked me right up.
>You had all your life to develop skills that people would look for and you chose what?

62252109
>>62252092
many such cases i just close the application when they ask for a video kek not doing that shit

62252326
>>62252092
I’d say their screening is pretty good because it filtered out a brown subhuman

62252359
>>62251998
Its fake
Its gay
Why is everything still pumping

62252377
>>62252055
This

Slavery is horrible

62256669
>>62251998
Just start your own MIC connected, tech adjacent, foreign labour importing, NWO, front company

62259419
>>62252007
probably true mostly

item.title: I hold thousands of LINK and regularly spread Chainlink FUD — 14 replies — 37.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I hold thousands of LINK and regularly spread Chainlink FUD

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:52 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62257369
>>62257367
you should have sold 5 years ago, hell I sold in 2022 (at $13) and got called retarded by the cult but it turned out to be a fantastic decision.

62257370
>>62257369
>you should have sold 5 years ago
>he doesn't know

62257380
>>62257370
you're right it was 6 years ago to be exact, the peak was August 2020. I still remember those days of pure euphoria mooning against the entire market.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257498
>>62257380
>he still doesn't know

62257507
>>62257367
don't we all
still buying to this day

62257511
>>62257369
>>62257370
>>62257380
>>62257498
>>62257507

KAAABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOMMMMM!!!!!!!!

62258063
>>62257498
doesnt know what, stinkie? are you implying link is gonna le mooooon to $1000 soon?
cuz if so, eat shit
eat literal excrement

62258569
>>62257367
One day you'll wake up and the realization of all that wasted time and cost opportunity spent on post ironic memes will hit you all at once and you'll blow your brains out. Along with every other bagholder who killed themselves as well

62258599
>>62257367
I have 60k Link staked in the community pool and 23k not staked. I'll be staking those when the pool expands. Also I have 629K SXT staked and 139K FHE staked, that I got for nothing from Build rewards.
I partly (though by no means fully) have fudders to thank for my diamond hands. It was abundantly clear from their obsession that Link was the one. And here we are. Nearly there.

62259006
>>62258599
83k LINK is a fat stack. Why did you not sell at $50? Could have bought literally any blue chip stock and have $10M+ by now. Anyway, I'm jealous. I have worked up to just over 60k now, though I had way less back then or I definitely would have sold.

62259041
>>62259006
Why did (You) not sell at $50?
And then bought vaccine stocks and sold the top?
And then bought oil futures and sold the top?
And then bought NVDA and sold the top?
Or even better, SanDisk?

62259090
>>62258599
>Nearly there.
nearly at the poorhouse, yes stinkie
the dump to zero is gonna be so sweet

62259157
>>62259041
No no no linky, you don't get to use those standards.

Why didn't YOU use you're foresight to perfectly buy the bottom and perfectly sell the top

62259345
>>62259006
>Why did you not sell at $50?
Because the pool is closed.

item.title: LINK/BTC is trading at October 2017 levels — 13 replies — 30.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
LINK/BTC is trading at October 2017 levels

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:49 UTC

OP

it's also down -95% from the 2020 peak. And Linkies have the audacity to get mad when they get called out as cuckold baggies lol

Early replies (first 3)

62257365
>>62257363
more baldie cope lol all you do is spam all day
>MY LINK MY KIDNEYS
kill yourself

62257371
linkies will tell you "buy the dip"

62257386
>>62257371
>linkies will tell you "buy the dip"

ok i buy then a zero

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257405
so ur saying it is now a good time to buy?

62257411
>>62257405
yeah dude, buy as much as you can! The Jews don't want you to buy Chainlink bro it's a conspiracy or something like that

62257417
>>62257363
Works on my machine.

62257426
>>62257417
what a wonderful PnD shitcoin chart keeek

62257429
>>62257411
remember when we were all making fun of xrp for being down like 99% vs btc and then it went to perform the best at the end of 24/start of 25

62258028
pain and misery, pain and pain and misery
pain and misery, pain and pain and misery
:}

62258103
stinkie linkies

62259296
THE cuckolds of crypto

62259320
>a 12x in gwei (the benchmark for alts) is le bad!!!

item.title: Polymarket whales scam people through UMA shitcoin — 19 replies — 28.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polymarket whales scam people through UMA shitcoin

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:34 UTC

OP

If you've ever bet on Polymarket and assumed the oracle that resolves
your market is anything close to decentralized, read this.

Full breakdown video: [YOUR YOUTUBE LINK]

A $17M market — "Will Trump say 'Iran' during events with Xi Jinping?" —
is being resolved right now by 10 wallets holding 95.3% of voting power.
That's 4.2% of voters carrying nearly all the weight. Round closes within
hours. Source: betmoar.fun [image in reply]

The evidence the answer should be YES is not subtle:

>White House Press Pool Note #5: Trump on the record saying "We did
discuss Iran. We don't want them to have a nuclear weapon" at 11:55 AM
Beijing on May 15
>Fox News live YouTube stream — isLiveContent=true, broadcast window
10:57 AM to 12:22 PM Beijing — fully encloses the moment
>TVB Hong Kong live, was_live confirmed, stream start 11:56:11 Beijing
>Kalshi (CFTC-regulated) resolved the IDENTICAL contract YES, no dispute
>The "Peng" outcome in the same Polymarket market group already
resolved YES on functionally identical evidence 24h earlier

So how is the same evidence chain heading to NO on Polymarket?

>UMA.rocks — a "voting committee" that publicly announces its vote
(P1 / NO) in the dispute thread while including the disclaimer "we
encourage voters to vote independently." Delegators earn 20.84% APR
for voting with the committee, displayed in their own dashboard.
This is coordinated voting with a fig leaf — opposite of anonymous
token voting. [screenshots in reply]

>Polymarket's "Additional Context" mechanism — they added a
clarification AFTER the dispute opened, narrowing what counts as
"live broadcast" to exclude pool-feed-with-delay (i.e. the entire
Fox/TVB/AP chain). Users bet against the original rule. Polymarket
resolves against a retroactive interpretation.

>One UMA proposer address: 304 proposals, 100% win rate, 0 disputes
lost. Either the resolution flow is mathematically unloseable or
someone has structural edge ordinary users don't.

Early replies (first 3)

62257394
>>62257375
indeed, it is a massive scam

62257427
>>62257375
>Per market rules, "only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution." Footage that was not broadcast live, even if filmed during the relevant events and released during market timeframe, will not qualify toward resolution.

>We’re aware of the dispute on this market. If a clarification is to be issued, it will be at 1:00 PM ET on May 15. If no statement is issued at that time, then there will be no clarification by the Polymarket team. The orderbook will be cleared at 1:00 PM ET, regardless of whether a clarification is made.
Could it be that the rules were different and you did not read them?

62257430
>>62257394
>>62257427
>>62257375
kill yourself baldie.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62257458
>>62257430
Im not bald you retard. Not even a bit.

62257478
>Honduran presidential election — UMA dispute voter pushed P1 NO
with a fabricated turnout recalculation from raw papeletas data,
contradicting La Prensa, El Heraldo, the EU observation committee,
and Transparencia Electoral's final report all citing 60.19%
turnout. Vote was edited to YES only after Polymarket intervened
to correct it. UMA.rocks weight made this very nearly succeed

62257482
Did you read the problem?

62257543
https://youtu.be/rWBb5dgUgJk

62257572
The UMA is weak my brothers.....

62257574
I don't get these whales if this is true. Do they intend on killing the platform for a quick profit?

62257686
gamble stupid things receive stupid results

62257695
There is metadata evidence matching official white house notes. You want fucking money? yes is cheap. Whales only have 20 million worth of UMA, maybe less. When this gets extended again because the official UMA admin ADMITTED they resolved p1 as a misclick, be sure that everyone who is hedging and buying yes at 0.3c is going to have more money to buy uma than those sweating because they have 1.8 million shares at 99.7c average. Already been going on for a week, whats another few weeks to flip 20$ into 5000$? Just need more people to join. We can make a smart contract that works the same as uma.rocks and defeat the uma cartel

62257697
>>62257375
Yeah it's well known that polymarket is a scam. They've decided the opposite of reality in many cases already. The only realistic explanation is that they are profiting from it, otherwise they would have threw UMA in the trash years ago.

62257986
>>62257574
no shit? take the money & run is always the best thing to do when given the opportunity

62258009
>>62257375
why would you vote on what politicians are saying in a closed door meeting
fucking retard

62258469
Namefags deserve the rope

62258549
>>62257375
>[YOUR YOUTUBE LINK]
kek

62258593
>>62257375
Buy an ad.

62259240
>>62257375
Bump just so others start to notice

HOW MANY TIMES YOU DUMB FUCKS HAVE TO BE TOLD THAT POOlymarket is a fucking SCAM?

>2+2 is 4? = Y (off course)
>Uh un chuds, UMA whales said is 5 because..reasons and Einstein and watermelon science man theories said is 5 so get rekt and thanks for playing

UMA whales decide every outcome, it's not about facts but voting power and who has the biggest whales

62259257
>>62259240
no way dude, putting up thousands of dollars on bets for questions with esoteric rules and subjective results is really smart

item.title: NTDOY — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
NTDOY

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-05-21 19:13 UTC

OP

Currently Nintendo stock is extremely mispriced. All the short-term doom and gloom is priced in, ignoring the company's tremendous long-term upside. While it's not some 10x your money in a week meme coin, at this point it's a sleeper stock to hold you should know about.

Early replies (first 3)

62259388
>>62259371
its not mispriced. they make shitty games for 80+$. no one wants to buy their crap because its shit.

62259405
>NTDOY baggie
KWAB

62259407
>>62259371
not misspriced
no point in shilling your bags here btw
>>62259388
this and console era is coming to an end. Future will be only game stations with steam like platforms. retards still go for the ps5 by some sort of pavlovian reflex. it's just a standardized computer with a standardized controller. Nintendo shined for a while 30 years ago now it has become so cringe i can't stand their adds like wtf is even this shit

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62259423
>>62259388
>no one wants to buy their crap because its shit.
Tell that to the 20 million people who bought a Switch 2.
>>62259407
>Future will be only game stations with steam like platforms
Possibly, but you're unfairly dismissing Nintendo's easy position to pivot and meet future consumer demands.

62259429
>>62259423
yeah i grew up with nintendo and i don't think they're going anywhere. Their time to shine is gone in fact even the gamecube was shit when i think about it. went only downhill from there

62259443
>>62259429
>Their time to shine is gone in fact even the gamecube was shit when i think about it. went only downhill from there
The console immediately after the Gamecube literally sold 5x as many units. Oops!

item.title: Ok, so we have AI displacing the workforce and possibly nuclear war and/or man-made super viruses coming up in the next… — 6 replies — 10.2/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:40 UTC

OP

Ok, so we have AI displacing the workforce and possibly nuclear war and/or man-made super viruses coming up in the next 10 years. I think now is probably a good time to exit crypto, since nobody is going to use it as a safe haven.

What are the best places to store your net worth during chaotic/SHTF times?

Early replies (first 3)

62257076
>>62257068
Any gay guys on here?

62257086
>>62257068
muuh apocalypse!!! run...run for your lives!!!

62257210
the only AI that is replacing us is "An Indian"

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62258762
>>62257068
I use AI to make gay furry porn

>>62257076
Yes

62259141
>>62257068
Sell crypto and buy stocks, Quantum computers will destroy crypto by 2032, as for all the other shit (nuclear wars, pLandemics, etc.) don't worry about it.

62259279
>>62259141
Another quantum retard lol. Remember to check back in

Hyperliquid

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:56 UTC

OP

Happy NEW ATH!!

We are here on the Livermore's chart.

Early replies (first 3)

62258749
>>62258306
I can't remember if I bought this or not. Until I open my wallet it is Schrödinger's coin.

62258987
>>62258749
I didn't buy the 20 dollar dip and have only like 29 hype at an avg cost of 40, I'm finishing unstaking tomorrow literally and will market sell and try to buy a dip again.
Grim

62259365
fuck me i missed out on this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: help wanted — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
help wanted

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-05-21 19:14 UTC

OP

>Honest opinions wanted
hello biz, I've been part of this particular place since 2017 and back i the days I was able to get some honest and good advice here. I feel stuck in a shit situation but I made some money with crypto. Heres the deal:
>30 years old
>~500k networth
>europoor
>absolutely fucking hate my job that I even went to uni for
>only make 2100 after tax a month
>stressing, shit job that sounds okay on paper but is hell in day to day business
>no one else hiring or paying same with equally shitty tasks or paying even less (yes even with a 40h / week contract)

My plan was waiting for lower prices on btc/eth to basically go all in all at once, (sitting on 400k fiat right now, i wish I was joking) double it when btc reaches it's previous ath for example and then just live of a 4% withdrawl rate. I don't think I could do that on 500k because everything keeps getting more expensive and retarded at a truly alarming rate and I will have to pay health insurance on my own (meaning my life will get more expensive, not less)

I can't start a business here because everything in my country is fucked and hopeless. But moving to SEA doesn't feel like the move either, I was looking forward to starting a family. But what the fuck do I do now? I'm fucking lost bros and I would just appreciate advice from anons that managed life at breaking points.

Early replies (first 3)

62259376
>>62259271
my honest opinion is don't go all in on crypto. it could go to 0.
Second opinion you shouldn't be taking life directions from this pit of losers. You make too little money, which means you're a cuck without real utility or achievement. This is confirmed by the fact you're taking advices from here.
500k, invest in cheap houses, rent, get bank credit after 1 year showing you're doing ok, get a 500k loan, rent more houses. simple and effective plan

62259449
If you want real advice, this is not the place.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn… — 3 replies — 7.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn…

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-05-21 18:50 UTC

OP

A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking. Does that mean if I’ve staked 2000 LINK, I’d earn $2000 per day?
Is that true, or was the anon just talking bullshit?

Early replies (first 3)

62258684
complete bullshit. if they opened staking to everyone and diverted 100% of all revenue to stakers(never happening), each link would make you less than a penny a day.

good thing holders are retarded and you can just make up bullshit for a decade tho

62258761
yes, but a loaf of bread will also cost 2000

62259325
test

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: You should be holding at least 1 BTC. — 119 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
You should be holding at least 1 BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 119 • Updated: 2026-05-21 15:31 UTC

OP

Imagine not owning at least 1 BTC before institutions and governments vacuum the remaining supply while you’re still debating if Bitcoin is a scam… or just trading crypto without considering BTC long term.

Early replies (first 3)

62219945
>>62219942
Or I can trade alts (leveraged BTC) and actually make it instead of getting a 2x pump

62219995
Fuck. I have 2BTC . Is that enough bro?

62220027
>>62219995
no, i have 3. and it's not enough, we're just poor faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62237423
>>62219995
you're rich mate.

62238430
>>62229077
Exactly, but turning BTC into an active asset will through native staking, instead of just worrying about future risks.

62238954
>>62234248
I'm not surprised lol

62239105
>just buy into the obvious ponzi scheme bro

62240786
>>62228616
hmm find better opportunities

62241339
>>62219942
Soon I will get to that 1 BTC mark, RN I'm buying more and staking some.

62244007
>>62238430
That's the right move anon

62244072
>>62219942
Bitcoin is getting fucked by the Jews

62246429
>>62241339
I know you can do it anon

62246430
>>62239105
If it has a high likelihood to make me rich then I dont care

62246437
>>62244072
it's just the cycle

62246447
>>62219942
I don't want to buy btc

62246571
>>62221733
>Its ok. I have monkey NFTs. They are the future
It still blows my mind that people thought rare Pepes could actually be a real thing.

62248268
>>62244072
Including you?

62248275
>>62222594
Bad actors are not going to have access to a quantum computer before things get figured out.

62249623
>>62246447
No problem lol

62251167
>>62246571
I think he's just being sarcastic lol

62252826
>>62219942
based
>t. living in (((hyperinflation)))
read about monero too
its the final solution to the taxman question and makes keynesian jews seethe

62252834
>>62219942
I mined 24 bitcoin on a RX480 in 2011 and I still have them.

62252845
>>62252834
truly based if true

62252856
someone from /pol had unironically sent me some btc in 2020 when kikes blew up our port
and bankrupt our central banks
if I didn't need the cash and had to sell for fiat I would have a much needed two thousand fucking dollars right now
keep stacking brothers
death to fiat

62253066
>>62252834
RX480 was released in 2016 you LARPer

62253216
>>62252856
Crazy I'm from lebanon too and someone didn't send me any btc because I'm not a serial begger, I too could use a very much needed 2k right now crazy!

62253224
>>62252856
This guys an israeli scammer btw he just makes scams out of any trend clearly he struck it big in 2020 as he said someone sent him multiple bitcoins and he's still here pretending.
He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.

62253228
>>62252856
He's also pretending his sister killed herself and asking for money for it in XMR threads.
Last it was his dad that died but only after he got 8k for it.
Fucker has probably got 7 figures

62254644
>>62253228
8K?
nigger I would fucking beat you up just because you're that spiteful
I never claimed I had a sister
>>62253216
iza 3anjad e7ki 3arabe yalla
>>62253224
>He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.
kek
I posted proof so many times
seethe more jew

62254676
>>62253224
>multiple bitcoins
>multiple bitcoins
>multiple bitcoins
how dense are you
I even showed the screencap it was like 300$ total

62255610
>>62254676
>>62254644
Ah look the scammers still here even after mass reporting my thread lol, schizo scammer melty schizo melty lol fucking faggot I got your number, next your identity.
I got some faggots from /g/ working on it.
You just thought you were immune to exposure.
You're dead wrong and this time I want to see who you are.

62256655
>>62255610
Moron

62258565
>>62253066
For real?

item.title: >be a normie >complain about rising costs of living >bitch about billionaires >*unmask the balance sheet* >12%+ frivolou… — 76 replies — 21.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
>be a normie >complain about rising costs of living >bitch about billionaires >*unmask the balance sheet* >12%+ frivolou…

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-05-21 15:43 UTC

OP

>be a normie
>complain about rising costs of living
>bitch about billionaires
>*unmask the balance sheet*
>12%+ frivolous fees/month
Why can't normies budget? is it just low IQ? Like this Plebbitor spends $110 a month on completely frivolous expenses at his stage (haircuts, spotify)

Also stories from normies being shit with money.

Early replies (first 3)

62254520
>take on debt to go to university
>make $2,200 a month
lol lmao

62254533
>>62254481
How is it fucking possible to waste $96 on a fucking haircut a month? And $13 for a fucking spotify? Aren't there free unlockers which take like 3 minutes to install?

62254543
>retarded normie can't help hemorrhaging money on dumb bullshit
A tale as old as time. He could get rid of his gym membership and with just a couple months of savings buy dumbbells and a pullup bar. He can buy a $20 electric razor and just shave his head a couple times a month. Music is free, if you pay for it you're a dumbass nigger.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62256439
>>62254621
A freed slave has zero net worth. Beats being a slave.

62256468
>>62254520
>>62254481
>stuff that used to be less than 1% of your income now 50% of your income to have
>KEK SHIT WITH MONEY KEK LMAO

62256472
Public service announcement for everyone confused how you'd owe the fire department:
Call 911 for almost anything and you'll quickly understand.

62256474
>>62256468
It's only that expensive if you're a retard and can't shop for shit.

62256523
>>62256474
point is, your dollar used to stretch far enough not even 25 years ago, that no one would bat an eye at those purchases. also you would make more and more money, but that ended. now people are noticing that they are being robbed and noticing the jewish-coded system. and you guys spergout when the goys think it's bullshit. that your callous response is "you can't have those things/you're shit with money/you can't shop/etc"

pretty soon it'll be. $15 to wash your clothes at the laundromat??? Go down to the lake and rinse your clothes in fecal water. You're getting more and more retarded.

62256544
>>62256523
You're overspending multiple times what you should for certain services/commodities and when someone tries to tell you how to budget like a non-retard you sperg out about the collapse of the system. Get fucked Mr. Silver Spoon, you spend like a spoiled kid you get mocked like one.

62256554
>>62255027
The writing in the OP does not look like a woman's. Also, vaginas spent a lot more on their hair than $48 per visit, or whatever.

62256572
>living in current day in america is like living in a third world country! Slavery never went away, it just evolved!
>ORDERS 12 DOORDASHES AND DAILY STARBUCKS

62256579
>>62256544
How do I budget for exponential never ending inflation on my stagnant wage, dumb fucking cocksucker?

62256585
>>62256544
bro, anon, i love you, but stop condoning this shit already

62256781
>>62256585
He’s right. The system is fucked but most of the world would kill for $2500 a month and it’s absolutely enough if you can cook chicken and potatoes and not spend money like a woman

62256785
LLM thread lol 50 1pbitd

62256791
>>62254551
>>62256396
>I live in DC
>MM
Nice larp ranjesh now go cover yourself in jam for me boy.

62256797
>>62256791
>for you ESL's confused by this nobody in the history of american history has ever abbreviated 20m (20 million)
with 20mm
It isn't a socket you ESL faggots, now please please if you're gonna LLM spam and larp goto r9k

62256815
>>62256797
You’re not nearly as smart as you think you are. Take a deep breath

62256858
>>62256815
Yea okay Bybon, son of Phola

62256865
>>62254481
I spend 5$/month for my phone. If I go over data it just slows down a bit but I don't get charged more. I'm mostly on wifi anyway. Who pays $110/mo for a phone bill?

62256883
>>62254481
Squat rack, bench and weights pays for itself in 6 months but maybe he doesn't have the space so okay whatever. $50 haircut every two weeks idk maybe he's black and needs a slick fade or the homies will jump his ass. Seems like a waste o money when you have $0 in the bank and a razor would pay for itself in two weeks

62257079
>>62256781
Most of the world aren't relevant since they aren't living in America

62257084
>>62254802
>Normies are called cattle by Jews and other non-normies for a reason.
Cause their parents don't buy them a block of flats with tenants once they turn 18?

62257246
>>62256883
>$50 haircut every two weeks idk maybe he's black and needs a slick fade or the homies will jump his ass.
imagine trying to justify being a nigger

62257421
>>62255083
>The median net worth of most people in america age 25-35 is probably closer to 3-5K USD
be realistic

62257449
>>62256865
He doesn’t own his phone, so he’s paying some company like Verizon or T-Mobile $110 a month instead of buying it outright.
Normies are fucking retarded.

62257993
>>62256523
>$15 to wash your clothes at the laundromat???
lol the one I got to is $16 total actually, $8 to wash and $8 to dry but it is the only one within walking distance and i dont have a car. it's all white people here so they can get away with those kinds of prices

62258026
>>62254481
>$110 for a phone. Does this faggot pay for triple platinum 6G with 10Gbit up/down and free calls to Nauru and Tuvalu?
What the fuck?

62258176
>>62254481
>rent $425
Is this from 2010?

62258317
>>62255552
Bro if you weren't so midwit yourself you'd read that my post grants their IQ went down. Because it literally couldn't have done anything but gone down. I'm not arguing it didn't go down.

62258334
Thinly veiled reddit ad

Kill yourself

62258471
>>62254481
>Phone - 110
Faggot shit. I pay $39/month on T-mobile 12GB Max Data Prepaid (just turn it to WiFi mode whenever home)
>Bus - 30
Get a bike
>Gym - 75
Buy some free weights, bench, and rack from Craiglist
>Haircut x2 - 96
$50 haircuts twice a month? WTF?
>Spotify - 13
Learn to torrent
>Monthly Income - 2,200
This nigger is only making $26.4k a month? Even just the most basic low level security / receptionist job pays $40k per year!

What a faggot. OP image taker should KYS.

62258608
>>62256781
pic related. nobody wants to hear a peep from anarcho-capitalist retards and rabbis on this topic. you can't keep spinning the prices going up like this.

>>62257993
yeah i figured. i thought my example was hyperbolic. and you're just confirming it's already gotten worse than that. it's completely ridiculous, my example was already obsoleted.
> it's all white people here so they can get away with those kinds of prices
no, they really can't. that shit is dumb.
